title: A round serving tray accessory system
abstract: A round serving tray and accessory system used to secure stemware. The serving tray and accessory system comprises an arcuate sleeve that has an inner and outer part, and a top, a bottom, a first and a second side. The top inner part of the sleeve defines an arcuate cavity wherein an innermost part of the sleeve is curved upward. The outer part of the sleeve defines an arcuate shoulder, the arcuate shoulder has a top, a bottom, a first and a second side, the bottom side of the arcuate shoulder defines and arcuate opening that linearly runs from the first side of the arcuate shoulder to the second side of the arcuate shoulder. And, a round serving tray that has a raised edge, the arcuate sleeve is mounted on the raised ledge of the serving tray via the arcuate opening so that the inner part of the sleeve rests on the round serving tray.
claims:
Claims Claims: What is claimed is: Claim 1. A round serving tray and accessory system used to secure stemware, the serving tray and accessory system comprises: An arcuate sleeve that has an inner and outer part, and a top, a bottom, a first and a second side, the arcuate sleeve is made of an elastomeric material and has a circumference that has a length that measures at least one fourth of the circumference of the round serving tray, wherein: the top inner part of the sleeve defines an arcuate cavity wherein an innermost part of the arcuate sleeve is curved upward; and the outer part of the arcuate sleeve defines an arcuate shoulder, the arcuate shoulder has a top, a bottom, a first and a second side, the bottom side of the arcuate shoulder defines and arcuate opening that linearly runs from the first side of the arcuate shoulder to the second side of the arcuate shoulder; and a round serving tray that has a raised edge, the arcuate sleeve is mounted on the raised edge of the serving tray via the arcuate opening so that the inner part of the arcuate sleeve rests on the round serving tray. Claim 2. The round serving tray and accessory system used to secure stemware of claim 1, wherein the arcuate sleeve is permanently fixed on the serving tray. Claim 3. A round serving tray and accessory system used to secure stemware, the serving tray and accessory system comprises: 

 An arcuate sleeve that has an inner and outer part, and a top, a bottom, a first and a second side, the arcuate sleeve is made of a polymeric material and has a circumference that has a length that measures at least one fourth of the circumference of the round serving tray, wherein: the top inner part of the sleeve defines an arcuate cavity wherein an innermost part of the arcuate sleeve is curved upward; and the outer part of the arcuate sleeve defines an arcuate shoulder, the arcuate shoulder has a top, a bottom, a first and a second side, the bottom side of the arcuate shoulder defines and arcuate opening that linearly runs from the first side of the arcuate shoulder to the second side of the arcuate shoulder; and a round serving tray that has a raised edge, the arcuate sleeve is mounted on the raised edge of the serving tray via the arcuate opening so that the inner part of the arcuate sleeve rests on the round serving tray. Claim 4. The round serving tray and accessory system used to secure stemware of claim 3, wherein the arcuate sleeve is permanently fixed on the serving tray.
